title: Trace Explicit and Implicit Grid Structure
summary: Build and verify grid formatting context in field manual topic index grid inspection through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain grid formatting context from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply grid formatting context without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the field manual topic index grid inspection case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves grid formatting context when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: field manual topic index grid inspection.
steps.why: Trace Explicit and Implicit Grid Structure makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in field manual topic index grid inspection.

content.text: Display grid creates a two-dimensional formatting context for direct child grid items. Declared rows and columns form the explicit grid; auto-placement can create implicit tracks whose size comes from grid-auto-rows or grid-auto-columns. Text runs may become anonymous grid items. Grid is appropriate when rows and columns matter together, while Flexbox is often clearer for one-dimensional distribution. Apply it to field manual topic index grid inspection.
